utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each category is also fully specified with details and costs: health_coverage includes both physical and mental coverage with monthly and annual costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs; total_budget provides a monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all five required items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance categories: health_coverage (LifeFirst Standard Plan), property_coverage (home/contents type, which matches LifeFirst Standard Coverage in the property_protection list), and travel_coverage (global family travel, which corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan in the travel_insurance list). From the ground-truth ratings, we can find the ratings for each of these exact plan names. According to the ground-truth data: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) = 8, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property) = 8, and LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel) = 7. Since the health_coverage in the plan includes both physical and mental aspects under one plan name, the best combined rating reference is 8 for both categories. Therefore, we map each chosen plan to its appropriate rating number.
